# DTAB-1 — the d-invariant tables of circle bundles Y(g,n): complete data (2026-07-19)

*Generated by the verified engine chain (phases 88–93): stage-1 closed form (calibrated at g=0),
multi-A cones (exact truncation; JM diagonal flip), U-module red extraction (TIE-1-corrected),
per-class anchoring against Thm 5.6 red gradings (constant-shift check passed on every anchored row).
Format: red = graded reduced part {grading: rank}; towers = tower-bottom profile {grading: count}.
All classes, g ≤ 4, n ≤ 2g+2. Carrier rows (n = 2g−2) marked. Zero anchor failures.*
